title: Ozempic vs Wegovy for Weight Loss: Key Differences, Cost, and Results
introduction: Ozempic and Wegovy both use semaglutide, but they are not identical in labeling, dosing strategy, and how they are typically prescribed. This comparison breaks down what matters for weight-loss decisions.

sections.heading: ⚖️ Ozempic vs Wegovy: Fast Comparison Table
sections.content:
| Category | Ozempic | Wegovy |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Active ingredient | Semaglutide | Semaglutide |
| Primary FDA indication | Type 2 diabetes | Chronic weight management |
| Typical use in weight loss | Often off-label | On-label for obesity/overweight criteria |
| Dosing structure | Weekly injection | Weekly injection, obesity-specific schedule |

Both options still require calorie and behavior adherence.

sections.heading: Weight-Loss Expectations
sections.content:
Outcomes depend more on dose tolerance + adherence than brand name alone.

| Driver | Impact on Results |
| --- | --- |
| Calorie adherence | Very high |
| Protein intake | High |
| Training consistency | High |
| Sleep and stress | Moderate to high |

Set your intake baseline with the [calorie calculator](/tools/calorie-calculator) and [calorie deficit calculator](/tools/calorie-deficit-calculator).

sections.heading: Side Effects and Practical Differences
sections.content:
Common GLP-1 effects include nausea, fullness, and GI discomfort. Practical differences often involve insurance coverage, pharmacy access, and clinician protocol.

For symptom-focused context, read [ozempic side effects explained](/blog/ozempic-side-effects-explained).

sections.heading: How to Choose with Your Clinician
sections.content:
Bring these points to your appointment:

• Your medical history and contraindications
• Insurance and cost constraints
• Realistic nutrition/training plan

Text CTA: Track your food and protein in Eati while discussing medication options, so your clinician sees real adherence data, not estimates.

midArticleCta: Use Eati to track daily intake while comparing Ozempic vs Wegovy so your decision is based on measurable behavior and outcomes.
conclusion: Ozempic and Wegovy are closely related but used in different clinical contexts. The right choice depends on indication, access, side-effect tolerance, and your ability to sustain a structured calorie plan.
metaTitle: Ozempic vs Wegovy: Weight Loss Differences, Cost, and Results
metaDescription: Compare Ozempic vs Wegovy for weight loss: dosing, indication, expected results, side effects, and how to choose with your clinician.

faqs.question: Is Wegovy better than Ozempic for weight loss?
faqs.answer: Not automatically. Both use semaglutide; outcomes depend on dose, adherence, and individual response under clinician guidance.
